text: now I thought I'd share some of my
favorite homecoming fail stories from
you guys this first ones from at Steve
Carlson
WUF he says I nervously asked the girl I
liked do you want to go to homecoming
when she said yes I was still so nervous
that at some reason I blurted out cool
with who I'm just doing a survey know
who's going with you
this one's from at boo-bear Melly she
says Nellie's song get your Eagle on was
playing I dropped down so low my pants
split down the middle all my friends had
to huddle around me and dance me out of
the gym I mean that's a friends at
horrible that's our friends at four this
one's from at air mail bird she says my
friend's dad rented a limo for him and
his homecoming date but he was also
their chauffeur and gave them the talk
on the way there when a man and a woman
love each other they this one's from at
dak Daniels he says I only knew one
dance move that I learned from an MC
Hammer music video and I danced that one
move all night my date asked if I knew
anything else so I tried an impromptu
spin move and accidentally slapped her
in the face
this guy's a disaster go home yeah this
one's from at MC Danny nine two one four
she says my date really loved the song
you're beautiful by James Blunt when it
came on he said he needed to feel this
one on his own and went to a corner and
danced with himself
you're beautiful beautiful can I be
blunt
this one's from red burning legacies ooh
she says our homecoming had a low budget
so we got an elderly DJ who played songs
off YouTube who spent half the dance
waiting for ads to be over I like this
guy though pretty good as last ones from
at VI price he says my mom chaperoned
our homecoming she showed up a little
tipsy and ended up leading the Thriller
dance
